text: this looks so much better than a wii. it was too easy to get the controllers out of range, the nunchuks and wires were annoying, the sensor bar fell off our tv a lot.

text: I love the Nex Playground! Its actually soo fun and there is workouts and theres dancing games for kids and adults/teens. It has tons of my favorite song! It's actually so fun and it has that one Miraculous game that tons of people I know used to play. It's the one where its like subway surfers! They have it on the Nex Playground except you have to move around, crouch, and jump🫰🥹
text_zh: 我太喜欢 Nex Playground 了！真的超好玩，有适合小孩和大人/青少年的锻炼和跳舞游戏。里面有好多我喜欢的歌！真的超好玩，还有那个我认识的很多人都玩过的《奇迹少女》游戏。就是那个像《地铁跑酷》一样的游戏！Nex Playground 上也有，只不过你需要自己动起来，蹲下和跳跃🫰🥹
